center.name: 科迪勒拉山系
center.summary: 科迪勒拉山系是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Maroon-chested ground dove、Scale-crested pygmy tyrant、灰猫嘲鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the American Cordillera of Central and South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scale-crested pygmy tyrant (Lophotriccus pileatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, native to the American Cordillera

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Native to most of temperate North America east of the Rocky Mountains, gray catbirds migrate to the southeastern United States, Mexico, Central America, and the Caribbean in winter; except for the occasional vagrant they always stay east of the American Cordillera
